## Recipes.IIngredientModifiers.spoonLevel property

For tsp/Tbsp measurements: whether the spoon is level, heaping, or scant. This is a display hint only and does not affect scaling calculations.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly spoonLevel?: SpoonLevel;
```
